meta.notes: Industry-level monthly KPIs extracted from manually-uploaded AMFI PDFs. Auto-detects Monthly Report vs press release per file. Optional fields are OMITTED when not detected — never zeroed. Rows merged by month; prior values preserved when the latest PDF doesn't carry them. processedPdfs=48 / 48, totalRows=25.
